## What does this PR do?

<!-- One line. e.g. "Add accordion entry sourced from shadcn." -->

## Type

- [ ] New component entry
- [ ] Update existing entry (source / adapt_rules / gotchas)
- [ ] Fix a dead or wrong `source.ref` link
- [ ] Docs / references
- [ ] Other (describe)

## Checklist

- [ ] `components.json` is valid JSON (CI will verify).
- [ ] Each new/changed `source.ref` was tested on a fresh React + Tailwind project.
- [ ] `source.method` is `"cli"` where a stable CLI command exists.
- [ ] `source.license` is filled in and correct.
- [ ] `inspo` links are style reference only (no code-source galleries).
- [ ] `adapt_rules` explain brand-token mapping (not raw paste).
- [ ] No duplicate of an existing entry (checked names + aliases).
